benefits.description: Sometimes used for egg quality in advanced maternal age

side_effects.description: Can raise blood sugar; may negatively impact those already overweight or insulin resistant

protocol_notes: User reports being over 40 and researching fertility options. Mentions omnitrope (brand name) as very expensive with prescription. Explicitly states did NOT take kisspeptin. Recommends against tesamorelin and ipamorelin as hGH secretagogues, preferring real hGH instead. Cautious approach overall.
